package rulecoverage

func NegativeRedisKeysCommandInHandler() string {
    ruleID := "redis_keys_command_in_handler"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`rdb.Keys(ctx, pattern)` in handler or loop code"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
